MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF BRUSH CREEK MEDIA, INC.'s MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND AMENDED COMPLAINT

Appearance: Matthew Kumin,Esq. (415) 217-3800 for plaintiff and moving party.
Robert K. Crowe, Esq. (415)438-4321 for defedant Pacific Sun Entertainment,Inc. and opposing party.
Jack Boujaklian, defendant in pro per, observing.
* The Court announced its tentative ruling: Granted in part. Plaintiff has leave to plead causes of action against Boujaklian for violation of B&P 17043 & 17044 Plaintiff is denied leave to plead causes of action for violations of B&P 17043 & 17044 against Pacific because there are no facts showing that Pacific sold items for less than cost. Plaintiff is denied leave to plead violation of B&P 17045 against all defendants. Plaintiff is granted leave as to all defendants to plead violation of B&P 17200, 17047, and 17048. Plaintiff is to segregate causes of action and comply with CRC 312(g).
No arguments. All parties submitted to the tentative. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff counsel to prepare order. Judge: A.J.Robertson; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter: K.Farnsworth, CSR # 5162. (PB) (503)

APPEAR: Matthew Kumin, Esq. 217-3800 for pltf & moving party with president of Brush Creek Media, Inc., Bear-Dog J. Hoffman (sworn & examined); Jack Boujaklian, 552-4213 deft & opposing party in pro per (sworn & examined).

To Dissolve Or Modify Preliminary Injunction; Declarations Of Motti Green And Kevin Eng;
Off Calendar Sep-27-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Matthew Kumin, Esq. 217-3805 for pltf & opposing party; Joseph M. Gabriel, Esq. 310/453-5900 for deft & moving party Pacific Sun Entertainment, Inc.; deft Jack Boujaklian also present.

INJUNCTION TO BE DISSOLVED UPON FILING OF DECLARATION) and ordered bond set at $250,000.00, to be filed within 10 "calendar" days.
